title: Easyday International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Easyday International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Easyday International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Easyday International Enterprises:
Easyday International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday International Enterprises!
